title: RPG Nexus: Hardcore Progression
description: A hardcore journey through forgotten realms. Evolve your skills, conquer dungeons, and survive the unknown.
body:
# 💀 NEXUS RPG: Hardcore Progression | 2.0

**Stop playing basic Minecraft.** Nexus RPG is a professional-grade **Forge 1.20.1** environment built to push the limits of exploration, combat, and hardware performance. What started as a Private SMP project is now available for everyone who wants a polished, high-stakes RPG experience.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13ce49a292e961fb8286e6a4c6559199819670c.png)

---

### VIRTUAL REALITY

* Do you own a VR headset? Experience the most immersive version of this world with the official **NEXUS RPG VR Edition**.
* **Download Here:** [Nexus RPG: VR Edition](https://modrinth.com/project/nexus-rpg-vr)

### THE CORE EXPERIENCE

* **TOTAL COMBAT REWORK:** Forget "click-spamming." Master a weight-based combat system with unique weapon animations, dodging, and tactical movement.
* **RPG PROGRESSION:** A massive passive skill tree allows you to specialize your character. Be the tank, the scout, or the master chef.
* **STRUCTURE EVOLUTION:** Every vanilla structure has been replaced with massive, sprawling dungeons filled with loot and traps.
* **BEYOND THE PORTALS:** The End and Nether are no longer empty wastes. They are fully fleshed-out dimensions with their own progression and final bosses.

### PERFORMANCE & STABILITY

This pack is built on a **"Zero Lag"** philosophy. Using the latest optimization engines (Embeddium/FerriteCore/ModernFix), we’ve ensured:
* **Ultra-Fast Loading:** Reduced startup times and instant chunk rendering.
* **Multiplayer Ready:** Fine-tuned for server stability and large community play.
* **Cinematic Visuals:** Includes shaders optimized to run smoothly even on mid-range hardware.

### IMMERSION & LIFE

* **Living World:** Realistic sound physics, 3D skin layers, and Fresh Animations make every mob feel alive.
* **Expanded Nature:** Hundreds of new animals, monsters, and biomes to discover across all dimensions.
* **Master the Kitchen:** A deep farming and cooking system to provide powerful buffs for your adventures.

---

### LEGAL & CREDITS
* **Content Creators:** You are free to stream or record this pack. Credit is always appreciated!
* **Modpack Developers:** You are free to use my modpack, customize it as you wish, and upload it. Giving me credit is appreciated!
